subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who art near unto the court of grandeur, the letter which thou hadst addressed to Jinab-i-Minshadi was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقرب درگاه کبریاء نامه ای که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گشت
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
